NexusAppSettings.NexusKeyFormatNote: If a Keys entry is configured, Format defaults to Utf8 when omitted.
NexusAppSettings.NexusKeyAlternativeFormatNote: Alternative NexusKey formats: Hex, Base64, or Base64UrlEncoded; decoded bytes must be exactly 32.

DrnAppFeatures.SeedKeyNote: Development default NexusKey material is deterministic. When no default NexusAppSettings:Keys entry is configured, this SeedKey feeds AppSecuritySettings, and AppSettings derives Base64UrlEncoded 32-byte key material from AppSecuritySettings context-derived values with BLAKE3 derive-key mode. NexusKey then derives MacKey and EncryptionKey through BLAKE3 derive-key mode. Changing SeedKey changes generated IDs unless the previous key remains in Keys for parsing.
DrnAppFeatures.SeedKey: Our true mentor in life is science! - Mustafa Kemal Atatürk (1924)
